title: Single-Cell Transcriptomic Atlas of Human Cardiac Arteries
author: Song, Jiangping
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains the processed single-cell RNA sequencing data and code in article "Single-Cell Transcriptomic Atlas of Different Human Cardiac Arteries Identifies Cell Types Associated With Vascular Physiology". Please refer to the article for the detailed sample information, sequencing and data processing methods. 

 cardiac_arteries_processed_data.zip: Processed single-cell RNA sequencing data from Cellranger output. 

 merged_all_samples: The output of Cellranger aggr, merging processed data of all samples. 

 Abbreviations in samples: AO, aorta; CA, coronary artery; PA, pulmonary artery. 

 notebook.zip: Jupyter notebooks containing code for data analysis.
